examples: I have come to believe that the key to interpersonal synergy is intrapersonal synergy, that is, synergy within ourselves.
Intrapersonal intelligence (self smart) entails the capacity to understand oneself, to appreciate one's feelings, fears and motivations.
Objective: To study the therapeutic efficacy of intrapersonal injection of cisplatin(DDP) and interleukin-2(IL-2) in malignant pleural effusions.
